result:
| ID | Priority | Reason |
|----|----------|--------|
| i1 | **high** | API accepts invalid input and silently creates corrupt data; affects every client. |
| i3 | **high** | In-memory store means all tasks are lost on any restart; blocks production use. |
| i2 | **med** | No pagination is a scaling hazard, but functional today; need a convention check before implementing. |
| i4 | **low** | Cosmetic copy change, no user-facing breakage, single file. |
| i5 | **ignore** | Misrouted; belongs to marketing/web team, not the task API. |
